name: 7artisans Photoelectric 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens For Sony E
description: A convenient everyday prime lens designed for Sony E-mount full-frame mirrorless cameras, the 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens from 7artisans Photoelectric is ideal for capturing everything from portraits to landscapes at a standard focal length.

features.Key Features: Full-Frame | f/1.8 to f/16 | Fast Aperture Everyday Prime | STM Stepping Motor | Two Aspherical Lens Elements | Multlayer Coatings | 11-Blade Diaphragm | AF/MF Mode Switch | USB Port for Firmware Upgrades
features.What’s In The Box: 7artisans Photoelectric 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood | USB-C Cable
